MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Gerald Ragan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Rhonda Fung. There being no proof of publication on file, the matter is ordered off calendar. Petitioner to file amended order for name change.
